title: Sweeter Vanilla
description: a Mopdpack with the intention of improving Vanilla without altering any of its mechanics, just adding graphic, sound and optimization improvements in various aspects without changing the Vanilla's essence.
body:
[![Modrinth - My other projects](https://img.shields.io/badge/modrinth-My_other_projects-00AF5C?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/user/Jacosvaldo) [![Discord - Jacosvaldo's Not Too Cool Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Jacosvaldo%27s%20_Not_Too_Cool_Server-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.com/invite/cPYyf3JqgU) [![Kofi - Tip me](https://img.shields.io/badge/kofi-Tip_me-F26B2E?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi)](https://ko-fi.com/jacosvaldo)

## 🍦 Sweeter Vanilla Sweeter Vanilla is a Mopdpack with the intention of improving Vanilla without altering any of its mechanics, just adding graphic, sound and optimization improvements in various aspects without changing the Vanilla's essence. ## ⚙️ Features Most notable features (Too much work list all)
✨ Details and Effects Water Splashes ![Water Splashes](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmedia.forgecdn.net%2Fattachments%2Fdescription%2F1219053%2Fdescription_4678497c-2509-47c8-aa19-264ab655e858.png&n=-1) Waterfall Cascades ![Waterfall Cascades](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmedia.forgecdn.net%2Fattachments%2Fdescription%2F1219053%2Fdescription_37321349-afcb-445f-bf8b-97adc123e676.png&n=-1) Fireflies ![Fireflies](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmedia.forgecdn.net%2Fattachments%2Fdescription%2F1219053%2Fdescription_79f6f459-600e-4f0d-83ad-6d8dbbffff54.png&n=-1) Falling Leaves ![Falling Leaves](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmedia.forgecdn.net%2Fattachments%2Fdescription%2F1219053%2Fdescription_a900b786-5bcc-46fe-8183-f8776d5da629.png&n=-1) Cave Dust ![Cave Dust](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmedia.forgecdn.net%2Fattachments%2Fdescription%2F1219053%2Fdescription_1a888eaa-9012-4c41-8528-330f073c9cdd.png&n=-1) And way more effects...
🔊 Sound - Presence Footsteps - AmbientSounds
⚡ Optimization Sodium, Lithium, Entity Culling, CCME, More Culling, ImmediatelyFast, and more ![Optimization Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84175572bbb18b3ed3ea71da19c129a27cb26ad2.png)
🎞️ Animations Eating ![Eating Animation](https://i.imgur.com/WngtdwB.gif) Player Animations ![Drinking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f756958986ad46f4cbe7875329399afb16e7ca71.png) ![Holding Map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f756958986ad46f4cbe7875329399afb16e7ca71.png) ![Climbing Animation](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftr7zw.dev%2Fnea%2Fladder.gif&n=-1)
🎨 Variations Enchanted Books: ![Enchanted Books Variation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1f826014368dc84e5c4179038b6dbaf607120a7.png) Visual Armor Trims ![Visual Armor Trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c66d447da76b09fc9af89d6fc1957f3bee760766.webp) Ores ![Ore Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3521e820a45c27827ffcf37913d3d2ac0a45abd7.png) Fish Buckets ![Fish Bucket Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb70531c1f0cb59f3c66fe835155488bb885bbe4.png) Flowers ![Flower Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5424a7c9b36ed56008115cdc50d32567505466c.png)
🌱 Grass Fast Better Grass + Simple Grass Flowers + Connected Paths ![Grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f15e51bd51d8cd255afe81aef73baaf8dc941b3.png) ![Connected Grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d179636d40717c75c0e9a136a9cda08c269db5a_0.webp)
🧩 Connected Textures Connected Paths ![Connected Paths](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Nyfj98b5/images/f6c6d41b56c69628243a81ec09642511ec8296b0.png) Clean Connected Glass ![Clean Connected Glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dIyWZMgP/images/fc2855d2ab4400b2b59c9d986324d73713df7d67.png)
